version_description: Credit to "Easy 2 Play Guitar Tutorials" on Youtube, just thought it woul dbe helpful to have the tab on here instead of just on Youtube.

versions.version_description: Multiple different chords added to match the song better.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] (2x)

[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
My last made me feel like I would never try again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
But when I saw you, I felt something I never felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Come closer, I'll give you all my love[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
If you treat me right, baby, I'll give you everything[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
My last made me feel like I would never try again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
But when I saw you, I felt something I never felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Come closer, I'll give you all my love[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
If you treat me right, baby, I'll give you everything[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Talk to me, I need to hear you need me like I need ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Fall for me, I wanna know you feel how I feel for you, love[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                                [ch]E[/ch]
Before you, baby, I was numb, drown the pain by pouring up[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Speeding fast on the run, never want to get caught up[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 Now you the one that I'm calling[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
Swore that I'd never forget, don't think I'm just talking[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I think I might go all in, no exceptions, girl, I need ya[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Feeling like I'm out of my mind, 'cause I can't get enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
 Only one that I give my time, 'cause I got time for ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
Might make an exception for ya, 'cause I been feeling ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
Think I might be out of my mind, I think that you're the one[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
My last made me feel like I would never try again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
But when I saw you, I felt something I never felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Come closer, I'll give you all my love[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
If you treat me right, baby, I'll give you everything[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
My last made me feel like I would never try again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
But when I saw you, I felt something I never felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Come closer, I'll give you all my love[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
If you treat me right, baby, I'll give you everything[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I'll never give my all again[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I'm sick of falling down[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
When I open up and give my trust[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
They find a way to break it down[/tab]

Tear me up inside, and you break me down
